calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-02-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of TWO Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Petitioner: Berthamalia Carmen Reyes, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the two Minors: Victoria Alondra Martinez Reyes and Juan Manuel Martinez Reyes, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the two minors were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to the Minors to: Victoria Alondra Reyes Martinez and Angel Isaac Reyes Martinez.
Decree signed in open court.
